scripts.build:static: npm run preflight && cross-env STATIC_EXPORT=true next build
scripts.build:static:gh: npm run preflight && cross-env STATIC_EXPORT=true BASE_PATH=/${npm_package_name} next build
scripts.verify: npm run preflight && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.verify:static: npm run preflight && npm run lint && npm run build:static
